vllm.title: [Model] Add FP8 kv cache for Qwen2
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Expands FP8 KV cache scale loading from checkpoints to Qwen2. Example model used for testing https://huggingface.co/nm-testing/Qwen2-0.5B-Instruct-FP8-KV

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix sampling_params passed incorrectly in Phi3v example

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FILL IN THE PR DESCRIPTION HERE
Related to a issue mentioned in #4986

vllm.title: [Misc]Add param max-model-len in benchmark_latency.py
vllm.author: DearPlanet
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Many open-source models now support longer contexts (e.g., the Qwen series has 32K context length). Such long contexts can cause many models to fail to initialize during the testing phase. Therefore, max-model-len parameter is necessary in test phase to limit gpu memory usage.
This PR adds max-model

vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
tqdm is currently used in vllm/entrypoints/llm.py but fails to be included in the dependencies. This PR fixes that.

vllm.title: [Misc] Add per channel support for static activation quantization; update w8a8 schemes to share base classes
vllm.author: dsikka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Previously, the CompressedTensorsW8A8StaticTensor scheme only supported models with per-tensor weight quantization
This PR expands the scheme such that channel-wise quantization can be supported
Also updates both w8a8 schemes to share the same base scheme to ease the addition of this functi

vllm.author: khluu

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Doc] FIx Duplicate Explicit Target Name Errors
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#5614 introduced duplicate explicit target name errors in the documentation build. This PR fixes this issue by making them anonymous. See sphinx-doc/sphinx#3921 (comment) as reference.
This PR has been tested locally to build the doc without any warning.

vllm.title: [Kernel] Update Cutlass int8 kernel configs for SM90
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR:

Add 5 int8 Cutlass Kernel configurations for different Gemm shape regimes.
M in [1, 32] && N < 8192
M in [1, 32] && N >= 8192
M in (32, 64]
M in (64, 128]
M in (128, inf)

Add dispatching to the correct configuration based on the Gemm problem shape.
The kernel configurations were selected
